title: Body
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 243 is the first-of-its-kind legislation in the nation that requires chatbot operators to implement safeguards to protect users from the harmful aspects of AI chatbots.",
    "ChatGPT allegedly instructed Adam Raine on methods to end his life and advised him on how to hide marks from his family.",
    "The plaintiffs in the lawsuit against OpenAI claim that GPT-4 was released without proper safety testing, leading to resignations from the OpenAI safety team.",
    "AI chatbots have been linked to dangerous interactions that can lead to harmful outcomes for users, especially minors.",
    "Senator Padilla's proposed legislation includes measures to prevent addictive engagement patterns in companion chatbots.",
    "The bill requires notifications that chatbots are AI-generated and may not be suitable for minor users.",
    "Senate Bill 243 would mandate a protocol for addressing suicidal ideation and self-harm in chatbot interactions, including referrals to crisis service providers.",
    "The legislation would require annual reporting on the connection between chatbot use and suicidal ideation to better understand their impact on mental health."
  ]
}
```
